# stdatadict - Secutrial Data Dictionary & Variable Selection

This R package provides functions for creating a data dictionary or
variable selection excel file based on the metadata files of an
Secutrial data export and additional files provided by the user.

A **data dictionary** is basically a compact form of the
“Datensatztabelle/Data Set Table” from Secutrial. Since it is created
from the exported meta data it holds only information about the
variables and forms that are included in the export. Furthermore it has
no information about data capture rules (e.g. under which circumstances
a variable is shown in the data capture) or unit conversion factors,
since this data is also not available in the export metadata. You have
to extract these informations from other sources and add it to the form
item tables, during the creation process.

A **variables selection table** is broadly speaking, a *data dictionay*
based on a full export, with a `select` column attached to the form item
tables. This ‘select’ column however can hold more or less complex check
rules, that makes it possible for the user to select entire variable
groups.

This package builds upon the the following R packages:

- [openxlsx2](https://janmarvin.github.io/openxlsx2/) for creating the
  excel file.
- [shiny.i18n](https://appsilon.github.io/shiny.i18n/) for language
  switching.

*Automatic translation of questions, item labels etc. is not
implemented. But I would happily do so given enough time and provided an
api key for google.translate, DeepL or any other translation tool.*

## Installation

### Prerequisites

Install the `remotes` package.

``` r
if (!rlang::is_installed("remotes")) install.packages("remotes")
```

### Installation from gitLab or gitHub (mirror repository)

Install `stdatadict` from the [gitlab
repository](https://gitlab.gwdg.de/medinfpub/stdatadict) repository with
dependent packages.

``` r
remotes::install_git("https://gitlab.gwdg.de/medinfpub/stdatadict", dependencies = TRUE)
```

Install from the [github mirror
repository](https://github.com/mrainers/stdatadict) repository with
dependent packages.

``` r
remotes::install_github("mrainers/stdatadict", dependencies = TRUE)
```

University Medical Center Göttingen

# Package index

## All functions

- [`active_color_theme()`](active_color_theme.md) : Get The Name Of The
  Active Color Theme
- [`add_asofdate()`](add_asofdate.md) : Add Export As of Date
- [`add_color_theme()`](add_color_theme.md) : Create a New Data
  Dictionary Color Theme
- [`add_empty_row()`](add_empty_row.md) : Format an empty Row in the
  worksheet
- [`add_form_overview()`](add_form_overview.md) : Create And Add A Form
  Overview To The Data Dictionary
- [`add_form_sheets()`](add_form_sheets.md) : Ceate And Add Form Sheets
  To The Data Dictionary
- [`add_heading1()`](add_heading1.md) : Add Heading 1
- [`add_heading2()`](add_heading2.md) : Add Heading 2
- [`add_paragraph()`](add_paragraph.md) : Add A text paragraph
- [`add_scope_selection()`](add_scope_selection.md) : Add Scope
  Selection Table to workbook
- [`add_section()`](add_section.md) : Add Section Title
- [`add_styled_line()`](add_styled_line.md) : Add Styled Text To The
  Workbook
- [`add_subtitle()`](add_subtitle.md) : Add Document Subtitle
- [`add_title()`](add_title.md) : Add Document Title
- [`clean_region_name()`](clean_region_name.md) : Clean Excel Region
  Names
- [`create_datadict()`](create_datadict.md) : Create A data dictionary
- [`create_datadict_tables()`](create_datadict_tables.md) : Create Data
  Dictionary Tables
- [`create_scope_table()`](create_scope_table.md) : Create a Scope Table
- [`fmt_txt_at()`](fmt_txt_at.md) : Format Matched Strings In a Text.
- [`get_color_theme()`](get_color_theme.md) : Get Data Dictionary Color
  Theme
- [`get_datadict_language()`](get_datadict_language.md) : Get Language
  Setting for Data Dictionary
- [`get_datadict_language_codes()`](get_datadict_language_codes.md) :
  Get available Language Setting for Data Dictionary
- [`insert_worksheet()`](insert_worksheet.md) : Insert a Worksheet into
  the Workbook
- [`intermediates`](intermediates.md) : stdatadict Environment For
  Intermediate Calculation Results
- [`join_scopes()`](join_scopes.md) : Add Variable Scopes To Form Item
  Tables
- [`join_with_form_items()`](join_with_form_items.md) : Add Data To Form
  Item Tables
- [`link_form_sheets()`](link_form_sheets.md) : Link Form Names in the
  Form Overview
- [`ls_color_themes()`](ls_color_themes.md) : List All Available Color
  Theme Names for Data Dictionary Creation.
- [`read_metadata()`](read_metadata.md) : Read Setup Data Files From A
  SecuTrial or stExport Directory
- [`set_datadict_language()`](set_datadict_language.md) : Set Language
  of the Data Dictionary
- [`show_color_theme()`](show_color_theme.md) : Show Color Theme
- [`style_datadict()`](style_datadict.md) : Create And Register Data
  Dictionary Workbook Styles
- [`tint_color()`](tint_color.md) : Tint or shade a color
- [`use_color_theme()`](use_color_theme.md) : Set Color Theme That's
  Gonna Be Used For The Data Dictionary
- [`wb_insert_row()`](wb_insert_row.md) : Insert a row in a sheet
  (emulated)
